full_content:
# KEY: VBS-806
---
# Summary:
As a Passenger, I want to rate my driver from 1 to 5 stars after the trip so that I can provide feedback on the service.
 --- 
 # DESCRIPTION:
Show a rating pop-up immediately after the trip status changes to 'Completed'.
Allow users to select optional tags like 'Clean Car' or 'Professional Driver'.
Calculate and update the driver's average rating in the database upon submission.
